001package net.okocraft.box.feature.gui.api.menu;
002
003import net.kyori.adventure.text.Component;
004import org.bukkit.entity.Player;
005import org.bukkit.event.inventory.ClickType;
006import org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack;
007import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
008
009public interface Menu {
010
011    int getRows();
012
013    @NotNull Component getTitle();
014
015    void applyIcons(@NotNull ItemStack[] target);
016
017    void clickMenu(@NotNull Player clicker, int slot, @NotNull ClickType clickType);
018
019    boolean shouldUpdate();
020
021    boolean isUpdated();
022
023    void updateMenu(@NotNull Player viewer);
024}
